meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't debug code
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how a SaaS starter kit and AI-driven workflows like Antigravity and Claude Code can help you ship production-ready apps faster.
content.answer_block: Stop manually debugging complex logic. By leveraging a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you inherit pre-configured error handling and observability. Pairing this with AI agents like Claude Code allows you to automate root-cause analysis, transforming days of troubleshooting into minutes of automated refactoring, ensuring your client projects ship on schedule.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client is expecting a demo by Friday, but you are trapped in a labyrinth of cryptic stack traces and unhandled state transitions. Every hour spent manually debugging is an hour bleeding your profit margins and damaging your reputation as a high-velocity developer.

It is time to stop fighting your own codebase. By switching to a robust SaaS starter kit, you move from 'building from scratch' to 'engineering on a foundation.' When you integrate AI-driven debugging tools, you stop being a code-janitor and start acting as an architect, letting intelligent agents navigate the complexity while you maintain the high-level vision.

steps.title: Initialize the Starter Kit Architecture
steps.description: Select a production-grade starter kit that includes built-in logging and error boundaries. This provides the standard structure required for AI agents to understand your project's context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure. Suggest a standardized directory layout that ensures modularity and enhances observability for automated debugging agents.

steps.title: Define Automated Error Handling Patterns
steps.description: Establish global error boundaries to catch crashes before they reach the user. This creates a predictable surface area for AI to scan when a bug occurs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a global error boundary component and a custom logging middleware that captures state snapshots upon failure.

steps.title: Automate Root-Cause Analysis
steps.description: When a bug occurs, pipe the stack trace directly into your agent instead of digging through files manually.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this stack trace and the associated file context. Identify the exact line of code causing the state mutation error and propose a fix.

steps.title: Implement Automated Regression Testing
steps.description: Convert every solved bug into a test case. This prevents the same issue from resurfacing in future client sprints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Playwright integration test based on the bug I just fixed to ensure this edge case is never triggered again.

steps.title: Continuous Code Health Audits
steps.description: Schedule a routine audit of your codebase to identify technical debt before it manifests as a bug.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a technical debt audit on the current repository. Highlight high-complexity functions that are likely to fail under load.

pro_tips: Always use structured logging (JSON) so your AI agent can parse logs without hallucinating.
Map your project's 'happy path' in a JSON schema; tell your AI to validate every state transition against this schema.
Use ephemeral preview environments for every bug fix to verify behavior in isolation before merging.
Maintain a 'knowledge-base.md' in your repo; feed this to your agent so it understands your specific architectural trade-offs.
When debugging, provide the agent with the 'last 5 git commits' to identify exactly which change introduced the regression.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is configured, set up a CI/CD pipeline that triggers an automatic AI audit on every pull request to maintain zero-bug velocity.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to stop debugging and start shipping. Don't let technical debt dictate your freelance career. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
